description: Our peel-off eyebrow gel contains glycerin, sodium hyaluronate, and avocado oil. It is long-lasting, does not easily discolor, has superior coloring ability, and the eyebrow styling effect can be maintained throughout the day. The method of use is very simple: Dip the brush tip into the eyebrow dye gel and evenly apply it according to the shape of the eyebrows. Wait for 2 hours until the gel is completely dry, then peel it off. It must be left on for 24 hours before it can be washed off. It is also waterproof and sweat-proof.
